description: Detects denial-of-service via panics in Rust: unwrap/expect on untrusted input. Simplified from Rust: flags all .unwrap() and .expect() method calls, not just those inside parameterized functions. Index expressions and narrowing casts omitted (cannot express without #match? predicate support). Precision reduced -- calls in zero-param functions also flagged.

flag.message: unwrap/expect call detected -- may panic on untrusted input causing denial of service
